nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Anjajavy Forest
nodes.summary: Anjajavy Forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括凤头马岛鹃，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 凤头马岛鹃
nodes.summary: 凤头马岛鹃（Crested coua，学名 Coua cristata），分类上属于鹃形目，并归入杜鹃科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Anjajavy Forest、马达加斯加、卡尔·林奈，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联38种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等38种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 鹃形目
nodes.summary: 鹃形目（Cuculiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联148种鸟类，如圭拉鹃、Greater ani、滑嘴犀鵑等148种鸟类。

nodes.name: 马达加斯加
nodes.summary: 马达加斯加是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、厚嘴棉鳧、馬島潛鴨等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 杜鹃科
nodes.summary: 杜鹃科（Cuculidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联147种鸟类，如圭拉鹃、Greater ani、滑嘴犀鵑等147种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The crested coua (Coua cristata) is a common medium-sized bird member of the cuckoo family, Cuculidae. It is endemic to Madagascar, mainly found in the coastal regions of the island. The crested coua is a weak flyer, so it will often be observed hopping from branch to branch in high canopies.{{Cite journal|last1=URANO|first1=EIICHIRO|last2=YAMAGISHI|first2=SATOSHI|last3=ANDRIANARIMISA|first3=ARISTIDE|last4=ANDRIATSARAFARA|first4=SOLOFO|date=2008-04-03|title=Different habitat use among three sympatric species of couas Coua cristata, C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The crested coua (Coua cristata) is a common medium-sized bird member of the cuckoo family, Cuculidae. It is endemic to Madagascar, mainly found in the coastal regions of the island. The crested coua is a weak flyer, so it will often be observed hopping from branch to branch in high canopies.{{Cite journal|last1=URANO|first1=EIICHIRO|last2=YAMAGISHI|first2=SATOSHI|last3=ANDRIANARIMISA|first3=ARISTIDE|last4=ANDRIATSARAFARA|first4=SOLOFO|date=2008-04-03|title=Different habitat use among three sympatric species of couas Coua cristata, C

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Despite being mostly found in littoral and deciduous forests, their habitats also consist open areas like savannas and brushlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although this species is marked as least concerned due to their stable populations, crested coua's numbers are believed to be declining due to habitat loss, degradation and hunting pressures. It is mostly hunted by humans for meat, but its main natural predators are fossas, hawks and eagles
